## 💡 Feature Summary
<!-- One sentence: what feature are you proposing? -->

## 🎯 Problem to Solve
<!-- What problem does this feature address? -->

## 🛠 Proposed Solution
<!-- How would this feature work? Be as detailed as you want. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you thought of? -->

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, examples, anything else helpful -->
